data_policy.rule_zh: 首頁 active 地圖只保留不重複、來源可回查，且狀態為計畫中/計劃中、評估中、設計中、施工中，或完工/啟用未超過一個月的資料；招標中、延宕、規劃中、待確認、已完工超過一個月、取消、停辦或來源失效者需移出 active 資料。
data_policy.rule_en: Active map data keeps only deduplicated, traceable projects that are planned, under evaluation, in design, under construction, or completed/opened within one month. Tendering, delayed, generic planning, unverified, outdated completed, canceled, suspended, or inactive records are moved out of active data.
